Tutorial: Sorting algorithms

Quicksort is a divide-and-conquer algorithm.

def quicksort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[0]
    rest = arr[1:]
    less = [x for x in rest if x < pivot]
    greater = [x for x in rest if x >= pivot]
    return quicksort(less) + [pivot] + quicksort(greater)

Preformatted whitespace inside pre/code should be preserved by the renderer.

Chapter 2: Merge sort

Merge sort takes a different approach.
